description: A journey is a trip from one place to another.
A brave person is not afraid to face danger.
example: The brave student spoke in front of the class.

description: To improve means to make something better.
example: She practices every day to improve her English.

description: A habit is something you do often or regularly.
example: Reading before bed is a good habit.

description: To focus means to give attention to one thing.
A confident person believes they can do something well.
example: He felt confident before the speaking test.

description: To review means to study something again.
example: I review new words every evening.

description: A goal is something you want to achieve.
example: My goal is to learn ten new words a day.

description: Something simple is easy to understand or do.
example: This app uses a simple learning flow.

description: To remember means to keep something in your mind.
